hero.title: Exclusive massage for your
hero.subtitle: Professional massage therapy in Cherkasy. Find your balance, release tension, and restore your energy in a luxurious spa atmosphere.

about.title: The art of healing
about.quote: “My goal is not just to relax muscles, but to restore the inner balance and harmony of your body.”
about.text1: Hello, I am Oleg. I am a certified massage therapist with over 10 years of professional experience. My goal is to help you release pain, stress, and muscle tension by combining classic techniques with customized therapies.
about.text2: Every session is tailored to your specific needs – whether you require deep tissue relief after an intense workout or a calming session to soothe daily stress.

advantages.title: Why choose
advantages.expDesc: Deep understanding of anatomy and physiology ensures safe, effective, and target-oriented therapy.
advantages.indDesc: Every session is designed around your specific physical needs, preferences, and focus areas.
advantages.atmDesc: A serene, private, and premium spa room equipped for your absolute comfort and relaxation.

classic.title: Classic Massage
classic.desc: A traditional Swedish massage designed for deep relaxation, muscle spasm relief, and comprehensive energy recovery.
classic.benefit: Effectively releases muscle tension, restores fiber elasticity, normalizes sleep, and reduces daily stress levels.
classic.seo_title: Classic Swedish Massage Cherkasy | Oleg Massage
classic.seo_desc: Traditional Swedish massage for deep relaxation and blood circulation improvement. Professional massage therapist Oleg in Cherkasy.
classic.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
classic.process_text: The session begins with a gentle muscle warm-up using heated organic oil. The therapist uses rubbing and kneading techniques to deeply work the neck area, back, and lower back. Trigger point therapy helps release persistent knots and restore joint flexibility. The session ends with relaxing strokes to stabilize the nervous system and induce deep relaxation.
classic.contraindications_text: Acute inflammatory processes, fever, infectious skin conditions, severe varicose veins.

anti-cellulite.title: Anti-Cellulite Massage
anti-cellulite.desc: An intensive sculpting technique aimed at combating local fat deposits and improving skin elasticity.
anti-cellulite.benefit: Activates microcirculation in tissues, reduces swelling, promotes lymphatic drainage, and sculpts harmonious body contours.
anti-cellulite.seo_title: Anti-Cellulite Massage Cherkasy | Body Sculpting & Firming
anti-cellulite.seo_desc: Professional anti-cellulite massage in Cherkasy. Improve skin elasticity, boost lymphatic flow, and sculpt body contours.
indications_list: Loss of skin tone and elasticity
anti-cellulite.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
anti-cellulite.process_text: The treatment is performed using a special warming oil to accelerate lipolysis. The therapist applies energetic kneading, rolling, and tapping techniques, focusing on the thighs, buttocks, and abdomen. This stimulates lymph flow and aids in toxin elimination. The session concludes with gentle drainage strokes to soothe the blood vessels.
anti-cellulite.contraindications_text: Pregnancy, fragile capillaries, severe varicose veins, skin inflammation in the treated areas.

sports.title: Sports Massage
sports.desc: An intensive deep-tissue massage designed to prepare muscles for training, accelerate recovery, and prevent injuries.
sports.benefit: Effectively relieves muscle hypertonus, eliminates trigger points, speeds up lactic acid clearance, and increases flexibility.
sports.seo_desc: Deep sports massage for athletes and active individuals. Relieve muscle tension, prepare for exercise, and recover faster in Cherkasy.
sports.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
sports.process_text: The session starts with vigorous muscle warming using therapeutic sports balms. The therapist performs deep-tissue work using firm pressure and friction. Elements of passive joint stretching are integrated to restore ligament elasticity. The treatment concludes with light lymphatic drainage to reduce soreness and restore energy.
sports.contraindications_text: Fresh muscle or ligament injuries, fractures, acute joint inflammation, skin cuts or open wounds.

lymphatic-drainage.title: Lymphatic Drainage
lymphatic-drainage.desc: A gentle manual technique aimed at stimulating lymphatic circulation, detoxifying the body, and reducing fluid retention.
lymphatic-drainage.benefit: Effectively reduces swelling in the face and limbs, strengthens the immune system, and restores body lightness.
lymphatic-drainage.seo_title: Lymphatic Drainage Massage Cherkasy | Detox & De-puff
lymphatic-drainage.seo_desc: Gentle lymphatic drainage massage to eliminate toxins, boost immunity, and reduce swelling. Professional therapy in Cherkasy.
lymphatic-drainage.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
lymphatic-drainage.process_text: The treatment is performed using extremely soft, slow, and rhythmic strokes along the natural pathways of the lymphatic system. The therapist begins by gently opening key lymph nodes and then guides the fluid toward these nodes with wave-like motions. The process is completely painless, deeply relaxing, and promotes fast detox.
lymphatic-drainage.contraindications_text: Oncological diseases, thrombophlebitis, thyroid disorders, acute infections.

cupping.title: Cupping Massage
cupping.desc: A therapeutic technique combining classic massage and vacuum cupping for deep-muscle tension release.
cupping.benefit: Relieves chronic back and neck pain, releases fascia, improves blood circulation, and resolves muscular stiffness.
cupping.seo_title: Vacuum Cupping Massage Cherkasy | Oleg Massage
cupping.seo_desc: Deep vacuum cupping massage to boost microcirculation, relieve chronic back pain, and release muscle spasms in Cherkasy.
cupping.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
cupping.process_text: Warm natural oil is applied to the skin for smooth gliding of the cups. The therapist warms the muscles manually, then places vacuum cups and slides them along the muscle lines of the back. The created vacuum targets deep tissues, providing a powerful rush of oxygenated blood to tight areas.
cupping.contraindications_text: Blood diseases, fragile blood vessels, moles or birthmarks in the treatment zone, acute inflammation.

hot-stone.title: Hot Stone Massage
hot-stone.desc: An exclusive spa treatment using heated volcanic basalt stones to provide deep warming and relaxation.
hot-stone.benefit: Completely relieves mental tension, warms deep muscle layers, improves sleep, and balances the nervous system.
hot-stone.seo_title: Hot Stone Massage Cherkasy | Premium Stone Therapy
hot-stone.seo_desc: Luxurious hot basalt stone massage for deep muscle heating, stress relief, and energy restoration in Cherkasy.
hot-stone.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
hot-stone.process_text: The session begins with a manual massage using aromatic oil. Heated basalt stones are then placed on key energy points of the back to release deep warmth. The therapist then massaged with warm stones and hands. This thermal therapy melts spasms, relieves fatigue, and induces total serenity.
hot-stone.contraindications_text: Heat sensitivity, high blood pressure, diabetes, skin rashes.

turkish-foam.title: Turkish Foam Massage
turkish-foam.desc: A spa ritual in the hammam, combining a silk Kese glove exfoliation and a massage in a cloud of organic soap foam.
turkish-foam.benefit: Gently removes dead skin cells, cleanses pores, eliminates toxins, and gives a sensation of absolute cleanliness.
turkish-foam.seo_title: Turkish Foam Massage Cherkasy | Luxurious Spa Ritual
turkish-foam.seo_desc: Indulgent foam massage on a heated stone bed. Gentle scrub with Kese glove and relaxing massage with organic olive oil soap foam.
turkish-foam.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
turkish-foam.process_text: Performed in a hammam on a heated table. First, the therapist scrubs the body with a Kese glove to remove dead skin cells. The body is then enveloped in a dense cloud of olive soap foam and relaxed with massage movements. The ritual ends with a warm rinse, leaving the skin glowing and smooth.
turkish-foam.contraindications_text: Allergy to soap ingredients, open skin wounds, cardiovascular diseases.

natural-massage.title: Eco-Organic Massage
natural-massage.desc: A delicate rejuvenating treatment for the face and body using 100% organic cold-pressed botanical oils.
natural-massage.benefit: Relieves facial muscle tension, improves skin tone, reduces puffiness, and deeply nourishes the skin.
natural-massage.seo_desc: Gentle restorative eco-massage using 100% natural, cold-pressed organic oils and aromatherapy in Cherkasy.
natural-massage.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
natural-massage.process_text: The session combines gentle facial, neck, and décolleté massage techniques with aromatherapy. The therapist uses natural, cold-pressed oils without synthetic additives, enhancing microcirculation and sculpting facial contours. The treatment calms the mind and restores natural radiance.
natural-massage.contraindications_text: Allergies to essential oils, active allergic skin reactions, pregnancy.

items.name: Johan Andersson
items.text: Oleg is an incredible therapist. After the sports massage, I felt like a new person. My shoulders have never felt this mobile.

items.name: Sofia Lindqvist
items.text: The hot stone massage was pure magic. The premium and serene atmosphere made the experience absolutely unforgettable. Highly recommended!

items.name: Erik Bergqvist
items.text: Professional service and outstanding skills. The lymphatic drainage massage helped me get rid of bloating and fatigue.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Processing of personal data
privacy.intro: We care about your privacy. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and protect the information you provide when booking a massage session.
privacy.section1_text: When filling out the booking form, we collect your name, phone number, selected treatment, and any additional requests left in the message.
privacy.section2_text: This data is used solely to confirm your appointment, contact you, and organize the session. We do not share your data with third parties and do not use it for marketing mailings.
privacy.section3_text: Our studio is located in Cherkasy, Ukraine, and we fully comply with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data at any time.
privacy.section4_text: For any questions regarding personal data processing or to request data deletion, please contact us by email: info@olegmassage.se.
